name: From Geneva or Geneva Airport: transfer to popular places around Lake Geneva
description: Discover From Geneva or Geneva Airport: transfer to popular places around Lake Geneva in Switzerland.
longDescription: Discover From Geneva or Geneva Airport: transfer to popular places around Lake Geneva in Switzerland.

subcategory.title: Transfer
subcategory.description: Book a transfer and get to your destination comfortably. A transfer is made by car or bus between two places. Very often it is a transfer from or to the airport. For bookable transfers, the starting point or destination is usually fixed (for example, the airport in Geneva). For the opposite, a city or place is fixed. Private transfers ensure you and your fellow travelers a comfortable ride to the destination

providers.name: SwissActivities
providers.description: Switzerland's largest activities marketplace — book securely online

gallery.alternativeText: Annecy: picturesque old town with water canal, old buildings, and cozy cafés
Lausanne: impressive architecture with historic buildings and city views
Leysin: idyllic mountain hut in front of snow-covered peaks and breathtaking natural scenery.
Montreux: picturesque landscape on Lake Geneva with colorful flowers and mountains in the background.
Evian: picturesque lakeside promenade on Lake Geneva with idyllic houses in the background.
Divonne: view of the lake with green landscape and idyllic atmosphere.
Vevey: impressive fork by Lake Geneva with mountains and art in the background.
Villars: Blooming meadows with mountains in the background in the summer landscape
